articles.author: Norah  O'Donnell
articles.title: Lung cancer in nonsmokers: "A women's health crisis" - CBS News
articles.description: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer death in American women — and a growing share of new cases are in women who've never smoked.
articles.content:
Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer death in American women — and a growing share of new cases are in women who've never smoked.

articles.author: Orianna Rosa Royle
articles.title: The American Heart Association has a new number for daily coffee—and a warning if you go over it - Fortune
articles.description: New research suggests drinking one cup of coffee a day is actually worse for your health than drinking four—but that fifth shot could cause heart failure.
articles.content: Theres nothing quite like a coffee in the morning to put an extra spring in your step. And new data suggests that boost isnt just in your headthe daily habit could be doing real, long-term good for y… [+3516 chars]
